payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was not returned because it has been superseded by mem_new, so it was correctly filtered out and should not be treated as current.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query context identifies Sam with Goldman, and the recalled current memory matched that context. No new durable entity commitment is needed from this debug explanation alone.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was eligible for recall for Sam from Goldman because it is the current memory and is not marked as superseded.
mem_old was excluded from recall because it is superseded by mem_new.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.
